scope: Dispatch 10 W1 README smoke copy/paste fix

commands.label: README scratch install smoke
argv:
set -euo pipefail
cd /e/Projects/project-init
SCRATCH="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$SCRATCH"' EXIT
export CODEX_HOME="$SCRATCH/Codex Home With Spaces"
export CLAUDE_HOME="$SCRATCH/ClaudeHome"
PYTHON="${PYTHON:-}"
if [ -z "$PYTHON" ]; then
  for CANDIDATE in python3 python py; do
    if command -v "$CANDIDATE" >/dev/null 2>&1 && "$CANDIDATE" --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      PYTHON="$CANDIDATE"
      break
    fi
  done
fi
[ -n "$PYTHON" ] || { echo "Python 3 is required" >&2; exit 1; }
./install.sh all
"$PYTHON" "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/scripts/validate_handoff.py" \
  --root "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates" \
  --contract "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates/.github/project_handoff_contract.json" \
  --json
printf 'CODEX_HOME_EXISTS=%s\n' "$([ -d "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init" ] && echo yes || echo no)"
printf 'CLAUDE_HOME_EXISTS=%s\n' "$([ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills/project-init" ] && echo yes || echo no)"
printf 'PYTHON_USED=%s\n' "$PYTHON"
commands.stdout:
Usage: ./install.sh [all|codex|claude]

Installs project-init to agent skill homes:
  codex   /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init
  claude  /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init
  all     both targets (default)

Environment overrides:
  CODEX_HOME   default: /c/Users/hamst/.codex
  CLAUDE_HOME  default: /c/Users/hamst/.claude

Safety note: install overwrites SKILL.md, templates/, and scripts/ inside
only the target project-init skill directory shown above.
Installing project-init to: /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init
Overwrite scope: /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/SKILL.md, /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/templates/, /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/scripts/
Installed project-init to /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init
Installing project-init to: /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init
Overwrite scope: /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init/SKILL.md, /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init/templates/, /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init/scripts/
Installed project-init to /tmp/tmp.v5rRoFCexZ/ClaudeHome/skills/project-init
Reload the target agent runtime to activate project-init.
[]
CODEX_HOME_EXISTS=yes
CLAUDE_HOME_EXISTS=yes
PYTHON_USED=python

commands.label: git status --short
commands.stdout:

 M SKILL.md
 M install.sh
 M scripts/validate_handoff.py
 M templates/.github/project_handoff_contract.json
 M templates/scripts/validate_handoff.py
